title: Spirited Away Ghibli Taste Tales
description: Join us for a magical evening filled with delicious Ghibli-inspired treats and enchanting tales from Spirited Away! Welcome to Ghibli Taste & Tales presents Spirited Away! Join us for an unforgettable evening of mystery, magic, and mouth-watering dishes inspired by Studio Ghibli’s iconic masterpiece. Hosted at Blossoms Cocktail Bar and Restaurant, this in-person event invites you to step into the spirit world and follow Chihiro’s journey through a land of strange creatures, ancient bathhouses, and unforgettable encounters. Lose yourself in the atmospheric setting, savour themed cocktails and gourmet bites, and relive the wonder of this beloved film with fellow fans. Don’t miss your chance to experience the magic of Spirited Away brought to life through food, drink, and storytelling. Enjoy three enchanting courses, paired with two cocktails to guide you through this otherworldly adventure. (Non-alcoholic options available). Vegan and vegetarian options available on request.
